title: Data Scientist / Fullstack Developer
description:
**About Mynt**  

Mynt is an all-in-one corporate card and spend management platform on a mission to reinvent business banking. By combining smart software with cards and payments infrastructure, we remove manual, time-consuming admin from how companies manage spending.


We’re growing fast across the Nordics and have secured significant funding to support our continued expansion in Sweden and internationally.


Mynt is a tech-first, product-driven company where teams are empowered to solve real problems and build things that matter. We’re a licensed e-money institution, card issuer, and payment processor, operating under the supervision of the Swedish Financial Supervisory Authority. Through strong partnerships with leading players such as Fortnox and Nordea — and many more on the way — our solutions are now live across all Nordic countries.


Joining Mynt means helping shape both a category-defining product and a company that’s still early in its journey. With 100+ colleagues (and growing), we’re building teams that value ownership, momentum, and customer impact.

**About the Role**


Mynt is now looking for a top performer with a strong drive and creative goal-oriented mindset to work with business data analytics. You will be expected to work closely with the CPO and leadership team to analyze and visualize a multitude of data, building on our existing ETL and analytics pipeline.


You need to have a strong interest in working in a dynamic and ambitious startup environment and have strong analytical and technical skills. You should have solid experience of data analytics.

**What you’ll be diving into:**

* Work extensively with our internal customer, transaction, and product data to deliver sharp and actionable insight to several functions at Mynt
* Work closely with senior leaders in business areas to understand the mechanics of each area
* Pro-actively develop business hypotheses and be prepared to test these with data
* Develop machine learning models for predictive analyses
* Take full ownership of problems, not just tickets

**What you bring to the table:**

* Experience in SQL and python or similar languages
* Bachelor’s or Master's degree in Engineering, Computer Science, or equivalent experience
* Fluent in Swedish and English

**What we can offer you:**

* Be part of an amazing team in a fast-growing scale-up.
* Work closely with a fun, high-performing team.
* Enjoy a flexible working environment with a great office location in central Stockholm.
* Shape your own development and responsibilities based on your passion and interest.

*The position will be filled as soon as we find a suitable candidate. Please reach out to us as soon as possible if you believe this for you!*

title: Senior embeddedutvecklare
description:
Vill du arbeta med embedded-system där prestanda, timing och systembeteende spelar roll – och där du tillsammans med andra utvecklar lösningar som faktiskt används?


På **Knowit Connectivity** i **Umeå** arbetar vi med avancerade embedded-system tillsammans med kunder som driver teknisk utveckling inom sina områden. Våra uppdrag rör ofta komplexa lösningar där mjukvara och hårdvara möts, och där tillförlitlighet, säkerhet och kvalitet är centrala delar från start.


Nu söker vi en senior embeddedutvecklare som vill arbeta nära tekniken i samarbete med andra erfarna ingenjörer – i en miljö där kunskapsdelning, respekt och olika perspektiv gör oss bättre.

### **Din roll**


Rollen formas delvis efter din erfarenhet och dina styrkor. Du arbetar i tekniskt krävande uppdrag, oftast i team tillsammans med kollegor från Knowit och ibland nära kundens organisation.

**Beroende på projekt kan du till exempel:**

* Utveckla och optimera embedded-programvara i C/C++
* Arbeta nära operativsystem, gärna RTOS och Linuxbaserade system
* Analysera och felsöka system där timing, resurser och beteende är kritiska
* Arbeta med kommunikationsprotokoll som exempelvis CAN, BLE, TCP/IP, USB
* Bidra till arkitektur och tekniska beslut tillsammans med teamet
* Samarbeta med systemingenjörer, test och hårdvara för att få helheten att fungera


I många uppdrag är spårbarhet, säkerhet och robusthet en naturlig del av utvecklingen – inte något som läggs på i efterhand.

### **Våra uppdrag**


Vi arbetar mot en bred kundbas inom bland annat industri, automotive, försvar och andra teknikintensiva områden. Gemensamt för våra uppdrag är att systemen ofta är komplexa och att kraven är höga.

**Det kan handla om:**

* system där mjukvara och hårdvara är tätt integrerade
* miljöer med realtidskrav eller begränsade resurser
* lösningar där säkerhet, standarder och kvalitet är centrala delar av utvecklingsarbetet

### **Om dig**


Vi tror att du har flera års erfarenhet av embeddedutveckling och en stabil teknisk grund. Du har arbetat i komplexa system där samspelet mellan mjukvara och hårdvara är viktigt, och är van att analysera, felsöka och göra tekniska avvägningar.


Samtidigt vet vi att ingen kan allt. För oss är nyfikenhet, samarbete och vilja att utvecklas minst lika viktiga som att redan behärska varje teknik.


Du trivs i miljöer där systemen inte är triviala, där detaljer spelar roll och där lösningar skapas tillsammans med andra kompetenser.

**Du har erfarenhet inom flera av följande områden:**

* C/C++
* Linux (gärna Embedded Linux)
* Realtidssystem (RTOS)
* Python (för scripting, test eller automation)


Erfarenhet från automotive-utveckling, till exempel arbete enligt fordonsstandarder eller i leverantörskedjor med höga kvalitetskrav, är meriterande. Även erfarenhet av säkerhetskritiska system eller arbete i reglerade miljöer är ett plus. Det är också meriterande om du har arbetat med kommunikationsprotokoll som CAN, BLE, TCP/IP och USB.


Eftersom vissa uppdrag kräver det behöver du kunna kommunicera på svenska och ha möjlighet att genomgå säkerhetsprövning.

### **Varför Knowit Connectivity?**


Vi samlar specialister inom embedded och uppkopplade system och arbetar i uppdrag där tekniken står i centrum.


Hos oss:

* Arbetar du tillsammans med andra erfarna ingenjörer i en hjälpsam och prestigelös miljö
* Får du möjlighet att påverka uppdrag, teknisk inriktning och hur vi arbetar
* Utvecklas du genom avancerade projekt i vardagen – inte bara genom formella utbildningar


Vi tror på en arbetsmiljö där man ska kunna vara sig själv, ställa frågor och utvecklas långsiktigt. För oss handlar senioritet inte om att alltid ha svaren, utan om att bidra till att teamet lyckas.


Som en del av Knowit får du tillgång till ett större nätverk – samtidigt som du arbetar nära och pragmatiskt tillsammans med teamet i Umeå.

### **Ansökan**


Vi rekryterar löpande. Skicka gärna in din ansökan via vår karriärsida.


#C++ #Linux #RTOS #Python #Automotive #Embedded

title: Fullstack Developer
description:
We now have a new requirement and are looking for a consultant colleague with the qualifications listed below. The position is part of our consulting business, which means you will be employed by us and work either with clients or on internal projects and assignments.

*As part of your application, you may be presented to clients/partners as part of the recruitment process. If selected for the assignment, you will be employed by us and work either with clients or on internal projects and assignments as part of our consulting business.*

 **Your Profile (Must-have requirements)**  

* Minimum 5 years of experience in software development.
* Strong proficiency in React, TypeScript/JavaScript, and modern state management (e.g. Redux, GraphQL).
* Experience with AWS and cloud native development (including serverless architectures).
* Good knowledge of asynchronous programming, microservices architecture, and cloud services.
* Experience with test automation frameworks such as Jest, Cypress, JUnit, and Mockito.
* Experience from mobile or connected applications is a strong advantage.
* Fluent in spoken and written English.  

  

**Application deadline:** 17-05-2026

 **About Us**  

We currently employ experienced consultants in areas such as System Development, AI, Machine Learning, Testing, Cloud, Infra DevOps, and IT Project Management.  

  

Working at Deploja is something entirely different from working at an ordinary consulting company—and we are really proud of that. So, what makes us unique?  

  

We simply offer more than just a high salary and greater freedom; that’s just the beginning. With us, you’ll find the work environment and opportunities you deserve. Welcome to Deploja, where the grass is indeed greener!

 **Vi erbjuder dig följande, Valet är ditt!**


Exciting assignments with our many clients. We focus on long-term projects, which gives you the opportunity to create value for the client while also developing yourself.


A secure monthly salary – together we’ll agree on a base salary depending on your assignments.


Company car – we encourage you to choose an electric car for a more sustainable future.


Occupational pension and great opportunities for salary conversion.


Vacation – Would you like more than 30 days of vacation, perhaps 60 days?


Private health insurance, accident insurance, and life insurance for increased security.


Skills development – you set your own budget and choose the training you wish to attend.


Quality of life – Are you struggling to balance everyday life and wish to work a little less while still earning as much, if not more?

*We handle applications continuously, and due to the high workload, it's especially important to include a short motivation for the position, explaining how you meet the requirements.*

title: Utvecklare till Barn- och utbildningsförvaltningen
description:
***Var med och forma framtidens skola***

*Vill du arbeta med utveckling som gör verklig skillnad? Hos oss får du vara med och stärka kvaliteten i utbildningen och bidra till att varje elev får bästa möjliga förutsättningar att lyckas.*

*Barn- och utbildningsförvaltningen befinner sig i en spännande utvecklingsfas – och nu söker vi dig som vill vara med och driva förändring med engagemang, nytänkande och framtidstro.*

#### 

#### **Rollen**


Som utvecklare har du en central och varierad roll där du bidrar både strategiskt och operativt. Du kommer bland annat att:

* Ta fram analyser, beslutsunderlag och förbättringsförslag till verksamhet och nämnd
* Arbeta med utveckling och uppföljning av vårt systematiska kvalitetsarbete
* Samordna och stödja arbetet med statsbidrag och informationshantering
* Samordna och stödja i förvaltningens beredskapsarbete
* Driva utvecklingsprojekt och vara ett stöd i att implementera nya arbetssätt och metoder
* Omvärldsbevaka och sprida kunskap från forskning och trender
* Planera och leda utbildningar och workshops


Här får du en roll där du både påverkar riktningen och bidrar i det dagliga arbetet.

#### **Det här är vi**


Hos oss möts du av engagerade och kunniga kollegor, ett öppet klimat och en stark ambition att ge alla elever bästa möjliga förutsättningar. Vi arbetar nära varandra, med korta beslutsvägar. Vi tror på samarbete, prestigelöshet och nya idéer – och vi ser fram emot vad just du kan bidra med. Möjlighet till distansarbete viss del av arbetstiden finns utifrån verksamhetens behov.

#### **Är det här du?**


Vi söker dig som vill göra skillnad och som trivs i en roll där du får kombinera analys, utveckling och samarbete.


Vi tror att du:

* Har en akademisk utbildning inom exempelvis statsvetenskap, samhällsvetenskap, offentlig förvaltning eller liknande
* Har erfarenhet av utvecklings- och förändringsarbete inom offentlig verksamhet
* Är van vid utredning och handläggning
* Kan arbeta både strategiskt och operativt
* Har goda IT-kunskaper och erfarenhet av databaserade system
* Kommunicerar tydligt och pedagogiskt, både i tal och skrift


Som person är du strukturerad, initiativtagande och trygg i att driva arbete framåt. Du har lätt för att samarbeta och anpassar din kommunikation efter olika målgrupper. Samtidigt har du ett helhetsperspektiv och kan se hur ditt arbete bidrar till större mål. Du arbetar självständigt, är trygg i att fatta egna beslut och tar ansvar för dina uppgifter från start till mål.


Eftersom arbetet sker nära verksamheter där barn och ungdomar vistas behöver du kunna uppvisa utdrag ur belastningsregistret inför en eventuell anställning.


Vi ger dig mer än ett jobb Hos oss får du en trygg anställning med många förmåner. Att du känner att du utvecklas på arbetet ser vi som en nyckel till att trivas. Som arbetsgivare tycker vi det är viktig att lyssna på våra medarbetare; vi värdesätter din kompetens och uppskattar att få höra dina tankar och idéer. Heby Kommun är en växande landsbygdskommun med närhet, trygghet och livskvalitet. Vi påverkar människors liv och tillsammans skapar vi möjligheterna. Vi är 1100 kollegor som ser fram emot att välkomna dig! Läs gärna mer om våra förmåner och medarbetare på www.heby.se och följ oss på LinkedIn och Facebook. Din ansökan och övriga handlingar som ingår i rekryteringsprocessen blir allmän handling när du registrerar din ansökan i vårt rekryteringssystem Varbi. Vi undanber oss alla erbjudanden om annonserings- och rekryteringshjälp i samband med denna annons.

title: Software Developer - Media Player & Embedded
description:
At Vertiseit Group, we’re on a mission to become the world’s #1 platform company for digital in-store experiences, with offices across Europe and North America and a strong partner network worldwide.


We’re now looking for a Software Developer to join the team working at the core of our technology – developing and evolving the media player that powers our business brands: *Grassfish, Dise, and Visual Art.*

### **The Role**


You will contribute to the development and maintenance of the Media Player, which is a hardware-agnostic, JavaScript-based **media player application** that runs on a wide range of devices and enables media playout, remote control, and monitoring of Digital Signage deployments.


You’ll join a strong, cross-functional development team focused on our shared IXM platform and player, internally known as IXM Grid team.


### **Who you are**


We are looking for a passionate developer with a strong problem-solving mindset, a drive for innovation, and a solid technical foundation. You are curious, hands-on, and enjoy building reliable software that works in real-world environments. You enjoy learning and sharing knowledge and thrive when working both independently and as part of a team. You are comfortable contributing across different parts of the development process – from implementation to testing and maintenance.


##### **To succeed in this role, we see that you have:**

* 3–5+ years of experience in application or systems-oriented development
* Programming experience in TypeScript, JavaScript and any frontend framework (we use Svelte)
* Experience developing for SoC-based platforms such as Samsung Tizen, LG WebOS, Raspberry Pi, BrightSign and Android
* Experience building or working with applications that run continuously with near zero downtime.
* Basic understanding of networking (TCP/IP, local networks, device communication)
* Familiarity with DevOps practices such as CI/CD pipelines and GitHub workflows
* Strong communication skills in English

##### **Nice to Have**

* Basic understanding of development across different device environments (e.g. Windows, Linux, x86, ARM), and how software interacts with physical hardware
* Experience with Android, Kotlin and Android application development
* Experience with tools such as Postman, Playwright, and writing scripts
* Hardware-adjacent development (e.g. embedded systems, IoT, sensors etc)
* Experience using AI-assisted development tools (e.g. code assistants, AI-based debugging, or productivity tools) as support in software development
* Strong communication skills in Swedish

##### **Our tech stack**


TypeScript, JavaScript, and Svelte, using Vite for building, Vitest for unit testing, and Playwright for end-to-end testing.


### **Why Join Vertiseit?**


We offer an inclusive work environment where you will be surrounded by skilled and passionate colleagues.

* Well-being first – Enjoy health initiatives and a generous wellness allowance
* Team spirit & fun – We believe in having fun together and organizing activities to create great memories
* Learn & grow – Work alongside talented colleagues in a collaborative and knowledge-sharing environment

### **Practical Information**


**Location:** Full-time position at our office in Stockholm  

**Application deadline: May 31** (We recruit on an ongoing basis, so apply as soon as possible!)  

**Questions?** Contact Hiring Manager Lisa Spjut at lisa.spjut@vertiseit.com


You can submit your application in Swedish or English. We look forward to hearing from you!

title: Senior frontend web developer (Europe)
description:
Join Represent on our journey to become **Europe's most attractive web agency**. We design and develop websites, webshops, and web applications with a *business-minded* approach to problem-solving. We mainly focus on developing headless Shopify and Sanity CMS solutions with React, Next.js, and Vercel.

  

Here's the gang on our team trip in June 2023 - we have since grown past 20 good people.

### **Agency (Remote) Culture**

 **Friendly and transparent**


We strongly believe in open, direct, honest, and friendly communication. We show our clients genuine human warmth combined with skills and professionalism that demand authority.

 **Freedom + Responsibility**


We believe in autonomous teams and people who control their time and responsibilities. Less micro-management. Fewer project managers. More flexibility, responsibility, ownership, and accountability for our team members.

 **Integrated team**


Despite our distance, we function as a “normal” agency in many ways, with two weekly team meetings, weekly tech talks, bi-weekly 1:1s, yearly team trips, and more.

 **A business-minded approach to problem-solving**


All our team members should understand our client's business objectives and be mindful of how we spend their resources, ensuring they get the best ROI from our collaboration.

### **The team**


We collect a rare combination of personality and skills and do not limit ourselves to the talent we find next door. Our team spans Norway (Oslo + Bergen), Croatia, Poland, Spain, the UK, Germany, and Austria.

### **Flexible Work Arrangement**


Our team members have a **flexible work relationship** with Represent that allows them to work as much or as little as they want. All our team members are **well compensated**, with a starting hourly rate equivalent to a full-time position in Norway (where it all began).

### **How We Work**

 **Project work**

* **Methodology:** We have an agile approach to projects and collaboration without following any specific framework to the letter.
* **Meeting cadence:** Depending on the type and size of our projects and collaborations with clients, we typically have 15-minute stand-ups with the client 1-2 days a week and short daily syncs with the team. The frequency depends on what makes sense for the project at the time.
* **Team size:** We usually have two developers on each project for a better dynamic and lower risk, working with 1-2 of our designers or the design team at one of our partner agencies.
* **Project responsibilities:** Most developers on our team are responsible for one main project at a time and maintenance/upgrades on a few other client projects.
* **Variation:** We do our best to make your work life interesting and challenging and to adapt to your preference of sticking with long-term projects vs. joining in on something new.

  

**Software**

* **Slack** for writing and talking with the team and clients.
* **Notion** for docs, wikis, task management, project management, and more.
* **Google** for video meetings, calendars, and email.
* **Harvest** for time tracking.
* **Figma** for design, brainstorming, data schemas, and more.

  

**Technology**


We mainly focus on the latest versions of:

* React + Next.js
* Vue + Nuxt
* Tailwind CSS
* Sanity CMS
* Storyblok CMS
* Vercel hosting
* Github

### **Client Projects**


We prioritize long-term partnerships with our clients, designing and developing websites, webshops, and web applications with a *business-minded* approach to problem-solving.


A few notable clients:

* Vitamail - Headless ecommerce with Shopify, Sanity CMS, and React/Next.js.
* WaterBear - Sanity CMS backend for video streaming service + marketing website with React/Next.js.
* Apex Wheels - Complex headless ecommerce for Silicon Valley-based client with Sanity and Vue/Nuxt.
* Current Value (Verdisatt) - Web application for valuation of stuff (like your grandma's ming vase) built with Sanity CMS, React/Next.js and a custom Node.js backend.


See more clients and what they say about our collaboration.

### **Benefits**

 **Stay focused on modern tech and fine-tune your expertise**

* We exclusively develop headless web solutions using modern platforms and JavaScript frameworks, like Vue/Nuxt and React/Next.js. We limit the amount of different frameworks we focus on at any time so we can be the experts and not the average generalists.
* We exclusively work with the top headless CMS (Sanity + Storyblok) and decline projects that require WordPress or other platforms that give you nightmares.

  

**Be part of an ambitious international team with a friendly, down-to-earth remote culture**

* We have an open, direct, and friendly culture and communication style within the team and with our clients.
* We combine genuine human warmth with skills and professionalism that demand authority.
* We believe in autonomous teams and people who control their time and responsibilities.

  

**Enjoy freedom in the form of a two-way flexibility where you can scale your work capacity up and down**

* Want to work from the Canary Islands for a month? Enjoy! Want two months off for a sabbatical? Sure thing! Need some extra cash before your summer vacay? Feel free to work a little extra.

  

**Healthy compensation**

* All our developers are well compensated. You control your work-life balance depending on what you value and what you need at any time.

  

**Co-create your ideal workplace**


Represent is a solid business with a startup mindset, and you'll take part in defining how we work and who we are as an agency. Exciting times indeed!

 **Yearly team trip**


In June 2023, we had an epic Thu–Mon in Begur, Spain We had an equally great time in 2024 on Mykonos island in Greece (not the sweaty clubs ). In 2025, the adventure heads to Tuscany, Italy.


And the answer is **YES**. Right before the barbeque transitioned to a dance party, the drone did end up falling into the pool for a wet death


### **Requirements**

* Minimum 5 years of commercial experience as a frontend javascript developer.
* Proficient in React/Next.js.
* You should be positive by nature, solution-oriented, and have excellent communication skills.
* Comfortable working directly with our agency's clients without a project manager, taking video calls to discuss and define requirements and tasks, and holding a steady dialogue with the client on Slack. The client should consider you an integrated and valuable part of their team.
* One last time: We prioritise excellent ***communication*** skills above all else.

  

**It's a plus if**

* You have experience with Sanity CMS or (headless) Shopify.
* You're a real CSS/UX nerd who loves creating amazing user experiences.

### **Communication**


It deserves its own heading. We say that "communication is half the job" of a developer. It's such an integrated part of all we do: writing and talking with your team, client meetings, video tutorials, commit messages, knowing when and how to ask for help, and even the code we write has an important role in communicating via its UX to those using the applications we write.


Here's one great example of what we view as "good communication" at Represent:


The finesse is just beyond... **enthusiasm** like no other, **text formatting** to control focus, a **feature video walkthrough** for efficient and convenient reference now and in the future **ridiculous humour** that would put a smile on anyone's face, and last but not least **high quality of work** behind the scenes.


Peter is an epic human being who has spent the last 14 years with Represent growing from a young freelance frontend developer to a full-time (super old) king of awesome who manages clients and projects like a true champion. Clap-clap


He's a great example of the people we want to attract and the culture we have at Represent. **Our culture is our secret sauce and a major reason clients partner with and stay with us.** We could hand our playbook to any other agency, but they couldn't copy what we do, because they're not *us*.

### **Hiring Process**


Here are the steps from reading this to working with Represent:



* **Complete this form like a true champion:** Prove your communication skills and try not to rely on AI to sound awesome, because you need to be a better human than a machine ;)


* **Introductory chat:** If your work from step 1 looks promising, agency manager Øyvind will invite you to a 30-minute introductory chat to get to know you.


* **Technical interview:** If Øyvind finds you a solid cultural fit for the team, you move right on to the end boss, our CTO Alexander. You'll spend an hour together mainly focusing on a project you're proud of, presenting the UI and codebase.


* **Trial workday:** We'll spend a full workday together on a test project to get a feel of our work dynamic.


* **Trial month:** If we're all happy with the first day of collaboration, we'll go on for a month.


* **Welcome to the team!**

title: Python Developer
description:

* Opportunities for learning where needed.

title: Software Engineer
description:
**.NET Developer Opportunity in Stockholm at Financial Company** 




  





 I am looking for a .NET Developer with solid front-end experience to join a well-established financial company in Stockholm. The ideal candidate will have 5+ years’ experience with .NET/C#, along with hands-on experience working with modern front-end frameworks such as React or TypeScript. Previous experience within the financial sector would be highly advantageous.
 



  





 The company offers a flat structure and highly collaborative environment, where you’ll work closely with skilled, senior developers and play a key role in shaping and evolving core systems that the business relies on.
 



  





**Key Responsibilities:** 




  




* Develop and maintain business-critical financial systems using .NET and modern front-end technologies.
* Work across the full software development lifecycle in close collaboration with the wider IT and product teams.
* Improve, adapt, and extend existing architecture, contributing to ongoing modernisation and migration initiatives.
* Solve complex, real-world problems within the financial domain and adapt quickly to changing regulatory and business requirements.
* Engage with stakeholders and end users to understand requirements and translate them into robust, maintainable technical solutions.



  





**Requirements:** 




  




* 5+ years’ professional experience working with .NET/C#.
* Front-end development experience, ideally with React and/or TypeScript.
* Experience with cloud technologies, preferably Azure.
* Strong experience working with SQL databases.
* Experience in the financial sector is a strong plus.



  





*This role requires candidates to speak fluent Swedish and visa sponsorship cannot be provided.* 




  





**Why join?** 




  




* Work on business-critical financial systems that support companies across Sweden and Europe.
* A flat hierarchy where you are trusted to take responsibility and influence technical decisions.
* Collaborate with a team of experienced developers who value knowledge sharing and clean engineering.
* Primarily .NET-focused environment with ongoing modernisation and greenfield development opportunities.
* Flexible hybrid working model, modern Stockholm office, 30 days’ vacation, generous wellness allowance, strong parental benefits, and additional perks.



  





**Please apply via the Easy Apply function.** 




  





**For more information, please email l.letchford@tenthrevolution.com** 




  





**The application deadline for this position is 29th of May, 2026. Applications are reviewed on a rolling basis, so early applications are encouraged.**

title: Creative Developers
description:
*MSAB is a global leader in digital forensic technology for mobile device examination and analysis. The MSAB vision is to empower every investigation with digital forensic solutions – for a safer world. A core value is to run an ethics-driven company with innovation and results. The sole focus of MSAB is on delivering high quality digital forensic solutions to collect, review, analyze and manage data. MSAB is a trusted partner to Law Enforcement, Defence Forces, Government Agencies and Forensic Laboratories in democratic countries throughout the world enabling them to investigate crime, gather intelligence, investigate fraud and fight corruption.*
 We love creating great code that matters - and the people who write it. We are always on the look-out for coders skilled in C++ or C# with innovative mindset.
   

  

 If you want to use your coding expertise and problem-solving mindset to make the world more transparent, safer, and more democratic? At MSAB, you can turn that ambition into reality.
   

  

 We’re a global leader in digital forensics, building advanced tools used worldwide to solve crimes, fight corruption, investigate fraud, and support justice. Here, your code has real-world impact.
   

  

**Possibilities**
 As a developer at MSAB, you’ll dive deep into complex and highly technical challenges - exactly the kind that motivate curious, inventive engineers.
   

  

**Your Work Might Involve**
* Extracting and decrypting data from mobile devices
* Writing decoders, parsers, and low-level implementations
* Reverse-engineering apps and making complex data structures readable
* Implementing efficient, high-performance code in C++
* Working close to hardware, embedded systems, Android, or iOS internals


 If that excites you - you’re exactly who we want to meet.
   

  

**Our Culture**
 Our culture is friendly, supportive, and built on shared learning and technical curiosity. You’ll thrive here if you enjoy autonomy, like exploring new ideas, and want to grow by stepping outside your comfort zone.
   

  

 There’s much more to tell you about our tech stack, vision, innovation and ways of working, and the opportunities ahead. But let’s save that for future conversations.
   

  

 Ready to build software that makes a real difference?
   

  

 Send your application today.
   

  

 For more information about MSAB, please visit: http://www.msab.com
   

  

 What we can offer
   

  

 Create a safer world with us!
   

  

 As one of the world’s leading digital forensics companies, MSAB leads the way in pioneering advancements that contribute to making our world safer.
   

  

 Your work at MSAB will bridge the gap between technology and justice. You will be inspired to go beyond your comfort zone, and you will deal with challenging and meaningful projects. When you join us, you become part of a global team that aspires to create a safer digital future, one breakthrough at a time.
   

  

 We can offer you an exciting work environment, where we value being innovative, acting ethically and delivering results in everything we do while our customers' needs are at the center. We are proud to be a fast-growing international company with more than 20+ nationalities and we work with things that really make a difference.
   

  

 Every day at MSAB is an opportunity to redefine the future of digital forensics.
   

  

 Are you up for the challenge?
   

  

 Department Development Locations Stockholm, Sweden Remote status Hybrid

title: Senior Full Stack Engineer
description:
**Senior Fullstack Developer — Hybrid / Stockholm** 




  





  





**Location:** 
 Stockholm, Sweden (Hybrid 2–3 days in office per week)
 



**Employment Type:** 
 Full-time
 



**Start Date:** 
 As soon as possible
 



  





  





**About the Opportunity**




 This is an opportunity to join a modern product-driven software company based in Stockholm, building tools used by tens of thousands of professionals and enthusiasts worldwide. The team designs and maintains cloud-connected applications that blend complex backend logic with intuitive, high-performance frontends, all powered by a modern TypeScript, React, and Node.js stack.
 



  





 You’ll be part of a small, highly collaborative engineering team where every developer contributes to architecture, product direction, and technical strategy. The environment values clean code, thoughtful system design, and developer autonomy. You’ll have the space to experiment, propose improvements, and directly influence how features are implemented from concept to release.
 



 This role is ideal for someone who enjoys owning technical decisions, scaling cloud services on AWS, and crafting frontends that balance performance with usability. If you like solving complex problems end-to-end and want to build software that truly matters to its users, you’ll feel right at home here.
 



  





  





**What You’ll Do**



* Design, develop, and maintain scalable full-stack applications using TypeScript, React, and Node.js
* Contribute to system design, making informed architecture decisions that impact performance, scalability, and developer experience
* Work closely with AWS cloud services (Lambda, ECS/Fargate, S3, RDS, CloudFormation, etc.)
* Build robust APIs, data pipelines, and modular front-end components
* Collaborate with designers, product owners, and DevOps to deliver high-quality features end-to-end



  





**What We’re Looking For**



* Strong experience with TypeScript, React, and Node.js
* Solid understanding of system design, architecture, and scalable application structure
* Hands-on experience with AWS
* Strong grasp of modern CI/CD workflows, automated testing, and performance optimisation
* Excellent communication skills in English
* Based in or willing to relocate to Stockholm



  





**What’s on Offer**



* A hybrid work model with flexibility and autonomy
* The opportunity to shape both code and architecture in a product-led company
* Professional development budget for training and conferences
* Friendly, international team culture with a focus on quality and innovation
* Competitive salary and benefits package

title: Junior Product Developer Soft Accessories - H&M Womenswear
description:
**Job Description**

*Are you passionate about fashion, trends and the idea of creating soft accessories that inspire and elevate the everyday wardrobe?*




 We are now looking for a curious and motivated Junior Product Developer to join our Women Accessories team at H&M, with a specific focus on Soft Accessories such as hats, scarves, gloves and related categories. If you thrive in a fast paced and creative environment and want to grow your skills in product development, this is an opportunity to contribute to a global assortment that our customers love.
   

  





**WHAT YOU’LL DO**
  

 As a Junior Product Developer within
 
 Soft Accessories, you will play an important role in the dynamic and multifaceted process of developing products for collections sold across all our markets worldwide.
   

  





 Together with a close and collaborative accessories team, you will support the development of a relevant and attractive soft accessories assortment, based on upcoming trends, customer needs and commercial insights. Your main responsibility will be to support the Product Developer in shaping the assortment and creating products that are aligned with our strategy, targets and customer expectations.
   

  





 You will work closely with a Product Manager, Designers, Planners and other key functions throughout the development process. Acting as an important link between teams, you will help drive the process forward and ensure smooth coordination from initial idea to final product.
   

  





 In this role, you will be involved in the daily operational work, managing several parallel tasks. This includes sample handling, follow ups and supporting the development of soft accessories that are beautifully made, commercially strong and relevant for the womenswear customer.
   

  





  

  





**WHO YOU ARE**
  

 We are looking for people with
   

  




* At least one year of hands on experience in product development or buying within fashion
* Specific experience from working with soft accessories or knitwear
* Relevant education in fashion, buying or product development
* A commercial mindset with a strong drive to contribute to business growth
* A good understanding of the womenswear customer and a strong interest in accessories and trends
* A structured and organised way of working, with the ability to manage multiple tasks simultaneously
* A collaborative and communicative approach, thriving in a cross functional environment with a humble and hands on attitude
* A curious mindset and eagerness to continuously learn and develop
* Strong commercial thinking, with an eye for opportunities and improvements
* A passion for finding smarter ways of working and contributing to better everyday processes



  

  





**WHO WE ARE** 
**​**
  

 H&M Group is a global company of strong fashion brands and ventures. Our goal is to prove that there is no compromise between exceptional design, affordable prices, and sustainable solutions. We want to liberate fashion for the many, and our customers are at the heart of every decision we make.​
   

  





 We are made up of thousands of passionate and talented colleagues united by our shared culture and values. Together, we want to use our power, our scale, and our knowledge to push the fashion industry towards a more inclusive and sustainable future. ​
   

  





  

  





**JOIN US**
  

 Additional information:
   

  

 This is a
 **full time temporary position based at our HQ in Stockholm.**
  

 If you feel your experience, skills and ambitions are right for this role, please send your application including CV in English as soon as possible. Interviews will be held continuously. (For internal candidates, please initiate a dialogue with you manager before applying.) If you are currently in a permanent employment with H&M you will keep your permanent employment even if you take on a temporary position for a limited time.
   

  





 Benefits:
   

  

 At H&M Group, we are proud to be a vibrant and welcoming company. We offer all our employees at H&M Group attractive benefits with extensive development opportunities around the globe. All our employees receive a staff discount card, usable on all our H&M Group brands in stores and online. Brands covered by the discount are H&M (Beauty and Move included), COS, Weekday, Monki, H&M HOME, & Other Stories, ARKET. In addition to our staff discount, all our employees are included in our H&M Incentive Program – HIP.
   

  





 Inclusion & Diversity:
   

  

 H&M is a part of H&M Group. At H&M Group, we’re determined to create and maintain inclusive, diverse and equitable workplaces throughout our organisation. Our teams should consist of a variety of people that share and combine their knowledge, experience and ideas. Having a diverse workforce leads to a positive impact on how we address challenges, on what we perceive possible and on how we choose to relate to our colleagues and customers all over the world. Hence all diversity dimensions are taken into consideration in our recruitment process.
   

  





 We strive to have a fair and equal process and therefore kindly ask you not to attach a cover letter in your application as they often contain information that easily can trigger unintentional biases.
   

  





  

  





**Take the next step in your career together with us. The journey starts here.**

title: Senior Backend Developer (Java)
description:
We now have a new requirement and are looking for a consultant colleague with the qualifications listed below. The position is part of our consulting business, which means you will be employed by us and work either with clients or on internal projects and assignments.

* Senior-level experience in backend development
* Java (17+), Spring Boot, JUnit, Maven
* Experience with microservices architecture
* Knowledge of Azure
* Experience with Terraform and Kubernetes
* CI/CD and GitHub Actions


**Application deadline:** 
 13-05-2026
   

  

**About Us**
 We currently employ experienced consultants in areas such as System Development, AI, Machine Learning, Testing, Cloud, Infra DevOps, and IT Project Management.
   

  

 Working at Deploja is something entirely different from working at an ordinary consulting company—and we are really proud of that. So, what makes us unique?
   

  

 We simply offer more than just a high salary and greater freedom; that’s just the beginning. With us, you’ll find the work environment and opportunities you deserve. Welcome to Deploja, where the grass is indeed greener!
   

  

**Vi erbjuder dig följande, Valet är ditt!**
 🚀 Exciting assignments with our many clients. We focus on long-term projects, which gives you the opportunity to create value for the client while also developing yourself.
   

  

 🌟 A secure monthly salary – together we’ll agree on a base salary depending on your assignments.
   

  

 🚗 Company car – we encourage you to choose an electric car for a more sustainable future.
   

  

 💼 Occupational pension and great opportunities for salary conversion.
   

  

 🌴 Vacation – Would you like more than 30 days of vacation, perhaps 60 days?
   

  

 🏥 Private health insurance, accident insurance, and life insurance for increased security.
   

  

 📚 Skills development – you set your own budget and choose the training you wish to attend.
   

  

 🕑 Quality of life – Are you struggling to balance everyday life and wish to work a little less while still earning as much, if not more?
   

  

*We handle applications continuously, and due to the high workload, it's especially important to include a short motivation for the position, explaining how you meet the requirements.*

title: Java Developer / Test automation engineer | SEB, Solna
description:
Join us to pioneer test automation and shape our tech landscape, combining your Java expertise with exciting GCP challenges in a brand new setup. This is a unique opportunity to lead the way in building innovative reporting & analytics solutions within a progressive tech environment.
   

  

 SEB is more than just a bank with an IT function. We are a progressive tech company powered by innovation and fueled by collaboration. From Java to AI and everything in between, we offer you an impressive tech stack and several technology paths. Together we're innovating for a sustainable society and building the tech arena of the future, a welcoming space for everyone.
   

  

**About the role:**
 As a Solution Developer in Analytics & Reporting, you will be part of an innovative, agile team that embraces experimentation and continuous learning. You will contribute to making SEB a more data-driven bank by working on initiatives such as customer reporting, push notifications, and regulatory reporting.
   

  

 You’ll be instrumental in establishing our test automation capabilities from the ground up, as there is currently no test automation within the team. This exciting opportunity allows for partial work as a dedicated test automation developer, pioneering robust frameworks and building test automation cases. Simultaneously, you will engage partially as a Java developer, contributing to our core applications. Your expertise will be vital in leveraging GCP to build scalable and efficient solutions. This blend of roles offers a unique chance to shape our future technology landscape.
   

  

 In this role, you will partly work as a dedicated test automation developer, designing robust frameworks and building automated test cases, while also contributing as a Java developer to our core applications. Your expertise will be vital in leveraging GCP to build scalable and efficient solutions. making this a unique opportunity to influence and shape our future technology landscape.
   

  

**To thrive in this role, we believe you have:**
* Experience with BDD (Behavior-Driven Development) methodology and Test Automation tools
* Experience working with GitHub and GitHub Actions
* A few years of experience in programming; with knowledge in Spring Boot Java, Kubernetes and Splunk
* Knowledge of distributed event streaming systems like Kafka
* Someone who likes to work according to best practices and deliver high quality software craftsmanship
* A positive team player willing to take ownership
* Positive attitude with strong motivation to continuously learn and adapt
* Excellent English skills


**Merits:**
* Any experience in Public Cloud (GCP preferred)


**What we offer:**
* Agile and modern ways of working, hybrid
* Work in the forefront of modern techniques
* Supportive skilled colleagues who value openness and teamwork
* Extensive training and learning opportunities
* A diverse and distributed team across multiple sites


**Do you want to be a part of SEB?**
 It is our fundamental belief that inclusion and diversity is crucial for our future success. We strive to have an inclusive, value-driven culture where employees feel valued, respected, and involved irrespective of who they are, what they believe or where they come from.
   

  

 Since we select candidates continuously, feel free to send in your application today via the link in this ad, but no later than 20th of May.
   

  

 Please be aware that our final candidates undergo background checks, a process that includes for example identity control, verification of qualifications, credit checks, company engagements and history of crime. In some cases, we also apply random drug checks. During employment, employees within SEB can also expect to undergo recurring background checks.
   

  

 SEB Sweden has a redeployment responsibility, why this position might be covered by internal redeployment
   

  

 Learn more about working at SEB on our Career website or through our Career podcasts.
   

  

 sebgroup.com/career
   

  

 bit.ly/SEBcareer

title: Senior .NET Developer - Fintech
description:
.NET Backend Developer – Fintech (Stockholm, On‑site)
 



  





 We’re working with a fast‑growing fintech company that operates at the heart of the open banking ecosystem, building API‑driven infrastructure used by financial services, ERP systems, and accounting platforms across the Nordics and Europe.
 



  





 This is a permanent .NET Backend Developer role based in a Stockholm office, joining a team that’s expanding due to continued success and growth.
 



  





**What you’ll work on** 



* Getting deep into an existing, production‑grade .NET microservices platform to understand how the system works end‑to‑end
* Working across multiple services deployed on Azure using Docker & Kubernetes
* Contributing to both maintenance and new feature development as part of a cross‑functional team
* Gradually taking on more complex development challenges as you build platform knowledge
* Playing a role in evolving the system architecture, with clear opportunities to grow into architectural responsibility over time
* Supporting a scaling engineering environment as the company expands into new markets



  





**What we’re looking for** 



* 2+ years’ experience with modern .NET (open to both early‑career developers and senior engineers)
* Experience working with APIs and microservices
* Experience in Azure environments
* Comfortable working with containerised applications (Docker/Kubernetes)
* Curious, driven, and eager to learn in a startup‑style environment
* Able to grasp complex fintech and payment flows
* Swedish speaking
* Financial / banking experience is a plus, but not required
* Interest in AI‑assisted development is a bonus (the team actively embraces AI tools)



  





**Why this role?** 



* High‑growth fintech operating successfully across the Nordics and the Netherlands, with strong bank and customer relationships
* Modern tech stack with an active push toward AI usage throughout development
* Collaborative, supportive, and open culture
* Clear career progression, including future architectural paths if that’s where you want to go
* Challenging, meaningful product work in payments, banking, and financial infrastructure



  





***Please apply using the Easy Apply function.***




  





***Application deadline is 24/04/2026, but applications will be processed on an ongoing basis so please apply ASAP if you are interested.***




  





***Any questions, please email t.collard-gentle@tenthrevolution.com***
