title: Nätverksspecialist till Bonnier News
description:
Nu söker vi en lösningsorienterad och tekniskt driven Nätverksspecialist till Bonnier News i Stockholm. Har du erfarenhet av nätverksdrift, routing, switching och moderna säkerhetslösningar samt trivs i en miljö med högt tempo och stor teknisk variation kan det vara dig vi söker. Här får du möjlighet att arbeta med avancerad nätverksinfrastruktur inom LAN, WAN, cloud och hybridmiljöer tillsammans med kompetenta kollegor och starka varumärken.
   

  

**Om oss**
 Bonnier News är ett av Sveriges ledande mediehus med välkända varumärken som Expressen, Dagens Nyheter och Dagens industri. Vi driver den digitala utvecklingen inom mediebranschen och arbetar kontinuerligt med att utveckla våra tekniska plattformar och arbetssätt.
   

  

 Vi erbjuder en kreativ och dynamisk miljö där du får arbeta med modern teknik och komplex infrastruktur i en verksamhet där förändringstakten är hög. Hos oss får du stora möjligheter att påverka, utvecklas och samarbeta med engagerade kollegor i en organisation som värdesätter innovation, kunskapsdelning och initiativförmåga.
   

  

**Om rollen**
 Som Nätverksspecialist hos Bonnier News blir du en del av infrateamet som består av totalt 14 personer, varav fem är specialiserade inom nätverk. Teamet ansvarar för nätverksinfrastrukturen internationellt samt inom våra cloudplattformar och samarbetar tätt med flera andra team och verksamheter inom koncernen.
   

  

 I rollen arbetar du både operativt och strategiskt med drift, utveckling och förbättring av nätverksmiljön. Du kommer att delta i såväl mindre aktiviteter som större projekt, ofta över avdelningsgränserna. Arbetet utförs främst från kontoret i Stockholm men resor till andra kontor och dotterbolag förekommer både inom och utanför Sverige.
   

  

**Dina Främsta Arbetsuppgifter Är**
* Implementera ny nätverksinfrastruktur, lokal hårdvara och cloudlösningar.
* Hantera och felsöka nätverksutrustning såsom switchar, accesspunkter och brandväggar.
* Arbeta med incidenthantering och samverka med relevanta team vid större driftstörningar.
* Planera och genomföra firmwareuppgraderingar samt samordna förändringar med intressenter och leverantörer.
* Övervaka nätverk, prestanda och utrustning för att säkerställa stabil drift.
* Dokumentera, rapportera och bidra till förbättringsarbete inom infrastrukturen.


**Vem är du?**
 För att trivas hos oss tror vi att du är en lösningsorienterad och ansvarstagande person som gillar att arbeta i en verksamhet där tempot är högt och förändringar sker snabbt. Du arbetar strukturerat och självständigt samtidigt som du uppskattar samarbete och kunskapsutbyte med kollegor.
   

  

 Du har ett genuint teknikintresse och drivs av att hitta förbättringar och effektiva lösningar. Vi ser även att du är kommunikativ och har lätt för att skapa förtroendefulla relationer, både inom teamet och med andra delar av verksamheten.
   

  

**Kvalifikationer**
 Vi ser att du har erfarenhet och kompetens inom följande:
   

  

* Minst tre års erfarenhet av installation, konfiguration, design, administration och felsökning inom nätverk.
* Fortinet-produkter såsom Fortigate, Fortimanager och Fortianalyzer.
* Switching, främst Juniper.
* Trådlösa nätverk, gärna Juniper Mist.
* Routing såsom statisk routing, BGP och SD-WAN.
* Goda kunskaper inom DNS.
* B-körkort.


**Det Är Meriterande Om Du Även Har Erfarenhet Av**
* 802.1x, Clearpass, Radius och PKI.
* SNMP och telemetry.
* ZTNA och säkerhetsarbete.
* Automatisering med exempelvis Python, Ansible, Terraform och Netbox.
* Paketanalysverktyg såsom Wireshark och Allegro.
* Radioplanering i Hamina eller Ekahau.
* Windows Server och Linux.
* Molnplattformar såsom AWS och GCP.
* VMware.


**Övrig information**
 Tjänsten är en tillsvidareanställning som börjar med en 6 månaders provanställning. Du kommer att tillhöra Bonnier News centrala infrastrukturteam och tillsammans sitter vi i Tidningshuset på Gjörwellsgatan 30 på Kungsholmen i Stockholm.
   

  

 Hos oss tror vi att det bästa upplägget är en mix av att ses på kontoret och de positiva effekter det ger, samtidigt som det finns möjlighet att arbeta hemifrån ibland för att få ihop livspusslet och bibehålla fokus. Vi är en arbetsplats med den trygghet som väl utformade kollektivavtal innebär. Du får friskvårdsbidrag, rabatter och fri prenumeration på våra nyheter, extra ersättning vid föräldralön, pensionslösning inom ITP1 och framför allt en inspirerande arbetsmiljö med fantastiska kollegor.
   

  

 Vi är nyfikna på vem du är och ser fram emot din ansökan! Med anledning av GDPR har vi inte möjlighet att ta emot ansökningar via email.

title: Senior Frontend/Fullstack Engineer
description:
Som Senior Frontend/Fullstack utvecklare kommer du arbeta att arbeta med välkända kunder inom publika och privat sekotorn. Vi jobbar med omfattande digitaliseringsprojekt för webb, mobil och affärslogik som gör verklig skillnad i många människors vardag! I teamet du kommer ingå i utgörs av vassa Frontend- och Fullstack utvecklare med bred kompetens i branschen. Vårt fokus är alltid att skapa innovativa digitala lösningar och driva utvecklingen.
 



  





*I den här rollen kommer du att ha en nyckelroll i:* 




  




* Utveckla och underhålla användarvänliga, responsiva och skalbara webbapplikationer.
* Arbeta med både frontend och backend med fokus på bästa möjliga användarupplevelse.
* Implementera och förbättra funktioner baserat på kundfeedback och affärsbehov i samarbete med UX/UI-designers.
* Skriva ren, strukturerad kod och säkerställa kvalitet genom granskningar och tester, samt stödja teamet genom att mentorera juniora kollegor.
* Implementera och lansera produkter effektivt genom att använda generativa AI verktyg.
* Delta i arkitektur och designbeslut och hålla dig uppdaterad om nya teknologier och trender för att föreslå förbättringar och säkerställa att vi bygger hållbara och skalbara lösningar.



  





**Din profil** 



* Minst 6 års erfarenhet av frontend och/eller fullstackutveckling i professionella miljöer.
* Expertkunskaper i JavaScript och moderna ramverk som React eller Angular.
* Stark förståelse för HTML5, CSS3 och preprocessors såsom Sass eller LESS.
* Erfarenhet av backendutveckling (Node.js, Python, GoLang, .NET eller liknande) samt av databaser som MySQL, PostgreSQL eller MongoDB, och bekant med APItekniker som REST och GraphQL.
* Mycket goda kunskaper i både svenska och engelska.



  





***Kunskap och erfarenhet inom följande områden är ett plus:***



* DevOps-principer och CI/CD-pipelines.
* Molnbaserade plattformar som AWS, Azure eller Google Cloud.
* Episerver/Optimizely eller Contentful, eller liknande CMSsystem, samt GenAIverktyg.
* Kunskap inom AI program eller AI verktyg.



  





**Vad vi tror kommer få dig att trivas** 



* Flexibla arbetsförhållanden & Work-from-Home Policy.
* Generöst friskvårdsbidrag, sjukvårdsförsäkring & tjänstepension.
* Bonusprogram.
* Komptensutveckling i form av utbildningar och certifieringar.



  





**Ansökan** 




 Tveka inte att skicka in din ansökan. Vi kommer att intervjua löpande och ser fram emot att hitta vår nästa kollega. Varmt välkomna med din ansökan!
 



  





*Som en del av vår rekryteringsprocess kommer identitetskontroll att genomföras genom granskning av ditt ID-kort, och bakgrundskontroller kan utföras vid behov.* 




  





**Om Capgemini** 




 Capgemini är en global partner inom affärs- och tekniktransformation som hjälper organisationer att påskynda övergången till en digital och hållbar värld, och samtidigt gör skillnad för företag och samhälle. Det är en ansvarsfull och mångsidig organisation med 340 000 medarbetare i över 50 länder. Med ett starkt arv som sträcker sig över 55 år tillbaka har Capgemini sina kunders förtroende att hjälpa dem frigöra värdet av teknik för att tillgodose hela deras affärsbehov. Capgemini levererar helhetslösningar som utnyttjar styrkan från strategi och design till teknik. Allt drivet av en marknadsledande kapacitet inom AI, generativ AI, moln och data, kombinerat med en djup branschexpertis och ett ekosystem av partners. År 2024 rapporterade Capgemini Group globala intäkter på 22,1 miljarder euro.
 



  





**Get The Future You Want** 
 | www.capgemini.com

title: Partner Sales Manager within IT Retail
description:
**About Us** 




 Velory empowers companies to automate and secure IT asset management in one seamless platform. From purchase to end-of-life, our software ensures complete control over IT assets with a sustainable, circular approach.
 



  





 Velory is transforming how companies buy, manage, and reuse IT. Our platform automates the entire IT lifecycle from procurement to end-of-life helping companies operate smarter and save both time and money.
 



  





 A core part of Velory is our network of IT retailers. They are not just partners they are essential to how we deliver value. Through Velory, customers purchase hardware via IT retailers, making them a critical part of our product and delivery. At the same time, retailers are a powerful growth engine. By reselling Velory as part of their offering, they bring new customers, new revenue, and help us scale across markets.
 



  





 We’ve already proven that this model works. Now, we’re scaling it across Europe.
 



  





**About The Role** 




**Your mission is clear:** 




 Sign top-tier retailer partners across Europe and build a channel that drives revenue. You will own the commercial process end-to-end, with a strong focus on pipeline, deal execution, and closing.
 



  





**This includes:** 



* Identify and prioritise leading IT retailers in key European markets
* Create and maintain a strong, high-quality pipeline
* Focus on partners with real revenue potential
* Closing high-impact partnerships
* Own the full deal cycle from first contact to signed agreement
* Position Velory as a growth driver for retailers, enabling new customers and new revenue streams
* Leverage Velory’s proven retailer model and adapt it across markets
* Identify what works and replicate success across regions
* Contribute to building a repeatable European partner playbook
* Bring insights from retailer conversations into product, pricing, and go-to-market
* Continuously sharpen the pitch based on what converts
* Stay focused on outcomes: signed partners and revenue potential



  





**What success looks like:** 



* Signed partnerships with retailers that can drive meaningful revenue
* Consistent deal velocity and high close rate
* Expansion of Velory’s retailer footprint across key European markets



  





**Required Skills** 



* Experience in B2B sales, partnerships or business development
* Experience within IT retail
* Proven track record of closing deals and driving commercial outcomes
* Strong communication and negotiation skills
* Fluent in English



  





**Nice to have** 



* Experience working with IT retailers or resellers in Europe
* Background in SaaS, IT hardware or marketplaces
* Experience from a startup or scale-up environment where you have had to build and move fast
* Additional European languages



  





**Who you are** 




 You are a commercial builder with a strong focus on closing, creating momentum and turning opportunities into signed partnerships.
 


* Show ownership: You are highly commercial and driven by results, taking full responsibility for outcomes and consistently turning opportunities into real business impact
* Manage speed: You have a strong ability to prioritise and focus on high value opportunities, moving fast and maintaining momentum in a scale up environment
* Represent quality: You run a sharp and structured process that drives deals forward and increases close rate
* Earn trust: You are confident in negotiations and stakeholder management, building strong relationships through clear communication and reliable follow through
* Deliver wow: You are motivated to go beyond expectations, creating impact in ways that stand out and leave a lasting impression



  





**What We Offer** 



* A unique opportunity to grow and learn in a fast-paced scale-up environment.
* A collaborative and inclusive work culture.
* Flexible work arrangements.
* Daily breakfast buffet at the office.
* Workouts with PT at the office gym.
* Private healthcare insurance and a generous wellness grant.
* Six weeks of paid vacation and ITP1-level pension.
* Select your preferred equipment via our own Velory Platform.
* Stockholm HQ with remote flexibility



  





**Join Us** 




 At Velory, you’ll be more than just an intern – you'll be a key player in our mission to revolutionize the digital landscape. If you’re ready to bring your creativity, skills, and passion to our team, we’d love to hear from you!

title: ERP Solution Architect
description:
At
 **Arcwide** 
 , we are more than just a consultancy – we are a team driven by
 **commitment, teamwork, excellence, and passion** 
 . As the largest
 **IFS Partner globally** 
 , we deliver world-class IFS Cloud solutions that transform businesses, and we’re on a mission to continue setting the standard for excellence. We are currently searching for motivated and dedicated individuals who are ready to take that next step of their career.
   

  

**What You Can Expect From The Role**
* Take ownership of designing end-to-end IFS Cloud solutions, ensuring they align with business requirements, best practice, and future scalability.
* Work closely with clients to understand their business processes and translate them into effective system designs and solution roadmaps.
* Provide leadership and direction during implementations, acting as a trusted advisor and subject matter expert across functional and technical streams.
* Collaborate with project managers, consultants, and technical teams to ensure smooth delivery of IFS solutions, including integration and data migration strategies.
* Stay at the forefront of IFS Cloud advancements and industry trends, advising clients on optimisation and innovation opportunities.
* Lead workshops, facilitate solution design sessions, and present complex concepts in a clear, business-friendly manner.
* Support pre-sales activities by shaping proposals and contributing to solution demonstrations.
* Mentor and guide more junior consultants, fostering a culture of continuous improvement and knowledge sharing.


**What We Will Look For In Your CV**
* Proven experience in architecting and delivering IFS Cloud or similar ERP systems (worked in an ERP implementation as Solution Architect or Lead Consultant).
* Strong understanding of key ERP modules such as Finance, Manufacturing, Supply Chain, Projects, or Service Management, with the ability to design cross-functional solutions.
* Demonstrated capability in leading client-facing workshops, managing stakeholders, and shaping solution design at both strategic and operational levels.
* Technical appreciation of system integrations, data migration, and reporting tools within an IFS/ERP environment.
* Ability to translate business requirements into practical, scalable ERP solutions.
* Excellent communication, presentation, and stakeholder management skills, with a consultative and client-focused approach.
* Experience working within an ERP partner, consultancy, or complex enterprise environment is highly desirable.
* Willingness to travel as required to support project delivery and client engagement.


**Why You Will Enjoy Working At Arcwide**
* Competitive Salary - where you are rewarded for both your individual and company performance.
* Benefits Packages - you will also have access to excellent benefit packages including holidays, private healthcare insurance, pension contributions, wellness programmes, mobile phone and laptop, and much more!
* Hybrid working – where each team has autonomy to determine their in-person and remote working schedule.
* Continuous learning – we understand that it is imperative to invest in our people’s development and we ensure that you are always progressing in your career or learning development.
* Equal & inclusive culture – we are committed to having a diverse and inclusive workforce where each individual feels they belong and can thrive in a work environment with a strong sense of community.


**About Arcwide**
 As the demand for IFS Cloud consulting continues to grow worldwide, Arcwide strategically positions itself as the largest preferred IFS partner by combining the world-class business consultancy of BearingPoint with the best-in-class cloud technology and innovation of IFS, to implement digital business transformation globally, delivering more value, faster. Arcwide is an IFS Platinum Channel & Services Partner that offers a full range of services and support to their customers worldwide. Arwcide has more than 500+ professionals in 23 offices in 16 countries, who collectively have hundreds of years of IFS experience in delivering business and technology transformations. To learn more about our company, click here.
   

  

**Equality And Inclusion**
 Arcwide is an equal opportunities employer. We are committed to having a diverse and inclusive workforce where everyone feels they belong. Fostering a work environment with a strong sense of community and where everyone can thrive is a core pillar of our business. We are focused on attracting and retaining the best people with the right skills and the desire to deliver excellent results, regardless of background. In return, we will provide a working environment in which everyone feels valued and can fulfil their potential, where their talents are fully utilised and company goals are met. We celebrate the strength that comes from our similarities and our differences through local initiatives which promote inclusion, outreach, and respect.

title: Senior Frontend Developer
description:
At Lendo, we’re driven by a clear mission: to empower people to make smarter financial decisions. Our work directly impacts how users understand and navigate complex financial journeys, and we take that responsibility seriously.
   

  

 We build our success on a culture where we live by our core values:
 **customer centric** 
 ,
 **win as a team** 
 ,
 **focus on execution** 
 , and
 **always improve** 
 . We are convinced that it is diverse perspectives, differences, and a strong collective drive that allow us to continue evolving. We are always looking for colleagues who wants to grow together with us.
   

  

**About The Role**
 You’ll join a cross-functional product team responsible for building and evolving Lendo’s core digital experience. You’ll work on user flows that are central to how our users interact with and benefit from our platform.
   

  

 You won’t just deliver features. You’ll help shape how we build them and take responsibility for how they evolve over time.
   

  

**As a Senior Frontend Engineer, you will:**
* Take end-to-end ownership of components and frontend architecture within your product area
* Drive performance, scalability, and long term maintainability
* Translate complex requirements into intuitive, high quality user experiences
* Build reusable and well structured components
* Contribute to technical standards and frontend best practices
* Collaborate closely with product and design to navigate trade-offs and priorities
* Influence technical decisions and participate in architectural discussions
* Ensure quality through testing, observability, and continuous improvement


 We value engineers who go beyond their immediate tasks, proactively identify improvements, raise the technical bar, and follow through on outcomes.
   

  

 Our frontend stack centres around React in a mixed TypeScript/JavaScript codebase, integrated with Go-based backend services via REST API’s in a cloud-native environment using Kubernetes on GCP. We continuously evolve our architecture with a strong focus on performance, maintainability, and developer experience.
   

  

**About You**
 We believe you have:
   

  

* 5+ years of professional frontend experience, including building and maintaining production systems
* Strong React and TypeScript skills
* Experience building and maintaining scalable frontend applications
* Solid hands-on experience working with REST APIs, 3rd-party integrations, and CI/CD
* Hands-on experience with Sentry and Playwright
* Familiarity with tools such as GitHub Actions, Docker, Kubernetes, Git, and Yarn
* A quality mindset where testing, reviews, and clean code are natural to you
* Pragmatic decision-making, you understand trade-offs
* A strong sense of ownership and accountability
* Comfortable contributing to technical direction and architectural discussions


**Nice to have:**
* React Native
* Next.js
* Experience improving frontend performance
* Experience contributing to design systems
* Experience in A/B testing


**About The Recruitment Process**
 As part of our recruitment process, we use psychometric testing through
 **HI Assessments.** 
 We also perform a mandatory background check on all final candidates. We will always inform you as a candidate before the check is carried out.
   

  

**We look forward to your application!**

title: SAC Solution Architect with a financial planning focus to Management Consulting, KPMG (Stockholm)
description:
Are you an experienced solution architect with deep expertise in SAP Analytics Cloud (SAC), passionate about financial planning and performance management and ready to deliver and shape transformative analytics solutions? Join KPMG’s Management Consulting and help leading organizations in Sweden shape the future of enterprise analytics!
   

  

**Your Role**
 We are seeking a SAC Solution Architect to join our Finance Transformation team in Stockholm. As part of our Management Consulting practice, you will collaborate with major Swedish corporations and organizations to design and deliver modern analytics solutions, drive digitalization, and support strategic decision-making.This role is a functional, business-driven position at the intersection of finance processes and modern technology.
   

  

 This is a unique opportunity to contribute to high-impact projects, work alongside senior stakeholders, and be part of a collaborative, high-performing, and purpose-driven team.
   

  

**Key Responsibilities**
* Oversee and execute SAC solution architecture, data modeling, and integrations of SAP and non-SAP environments
* Lead requirements workshops and process discussions with finance and business stakeholders
* Develop functional planning models, implement driver-based logic, and configure data flows to support accurate and efficient financial planning
* Together with business process experts design end-to-end SAC Planning solutions, including predictive scenarios and dashboards, to optimize business planning processes
* Drive governance, performance optimization, and best practices within analytics solutions
* Collaborate with technical teams to ensure accurate data integration and model performance
* Translate business needs into solution architecture, ensuring scalability and best-practice design. Partner with stakeholders to deliver scalable and robust analytics solutions
* Facilitate workshops to engage both business stakeholders and technical teams


 ,
   

  

**Relevant Experience And Knowledge**
* You have significant experience in business intelligence, analytics, or data warehousing, with at least 8 years in the field and a minimum of 3 years working directly with SAC
* You have strong understanding of FP&A, budgeting, forecasting, cost allocation, and performance management
* You have knowledge of planning best practices: scenario modelling, rolling forecasting, driver-based planning
* Basic knowledge in SAP BW, HANA Data Warehouse, Datasphere, and integration of complex systems
* You have demonstrated success in solution architecture, leadership of analytics initiatives and experience collaborating with cross-functional teams including finance, business, and technical stakeholders
* You have experience facilitating workshops with finance stakeholders and ability to translate business requirements into planning models, driver-based logic, workflows, and reporting structures


**Requirements**
* Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, Finance, Business, Engineering, or related field
* Minimum of 8 years’ experience in BI/Analytics/Data Warehousing, with at least 3 years in SAP Analytics Cloud
* Strong analytical and conceptual skills with the ability to design end-to-end planning processes
* Practical experience with SAC Planning or similar enterprise planning tools
* Strong business acumen and proven leadership in analytics projects
* Excellent communication and workshop facilitation skills
* Ability to operate cross-functionally across finance, business, and technical areas
* Fluency in English


**What We offer:**
* An exciting opportunity to work on different types of engagements across various industries
* An inspiring work environment where you are empowered to perform at your best
* An inclusive environment where diversity is one of our core foundations
* A flexible workplace, where work-life balance is a top priority
* Generous employee benefits package


 Want to make a difference together with us?
   

  

 Then you are warmly welcomed with your application. If you have any questions regarding the position, you are very welcome to contact our Head of Finance Transformation Victor Crona victor.crona@kpmg.se or responsible Talent Manager amanda.geries@kpmg.se

title: Senior Streaming Engineer
description:
We’re looking for a
 **Senior Streaming Engineer** 
 to join us.
   

  

**I’m Mikael Malmborg, Head of Video Streaming, and I’m searching for someone ready to grow with us.** 
 We’re a highly engaged team of experts within our domain focused on
 **building, securing, and scaling the streaming platform that delivers the award winning, world‑class Live and VOD Telia Play service to our Nordic customers** 
 .
   

  

 Within Video Streaming, our mission is simple but ambitious:
   

  

**We make everything behind the “play” button work when it comes to streaming - reliably, securely, and at scale.**
 In Streaming Infrastructure, we operate the backbone of that mission: the ingest, processing, packaging, delivery, observability, and automation that ensure our customers always get a smooth, high‑quality TV and streaming experience.
   

  

**What you’ll do:**
 As a Senior Streaming Engineer, you will together with the team
 **own and evolve our streaming media pipelines, platforms, and tooling that power the Telia Play streaming service across the Nordics.**
* Develop and operate high‑availability, automated streaming infrastructure across Live, VOD, and time‑shifted services.
* Create scalable DevOps workflows, observability capabilities, and tools that ensure reliability, security, and operational excellence end‑to‑end.
* Consult and collaborate with Product, Backend, Player, Network, and Security teams to drive technical strategy, best practices, and long‑term architectural direction.
* Lead improvements within Dynamic Ad Insertion (DAI), DRM, acquisition, encoding, streaming, anti-piracy, cloud scalability, CDN performance, and distributed systems reliability.


**What will help you thrive in this role:**
 You’ll thrive here if you enjoy solving large‑scale technical challenges, driving architectural clarity, and elevating engineering practices across team boundaries.
   

  

* Proven experience in streaming technologies, distributed systems, hardware, OS and cloud‑native DevOps engineering (5+ years).
* Strong knowledge of AWS, media services, DevOps toolchains, Dynamic Ad Insertion, DRM systems (Widevine, PlayReady, FairPlay), streaming protocols (HLS, DASH) and modern observability.
* Ability to balance strategic thinking with hands‑on problem‑solving, especially in high‑traffic, event‑driven environments.
* Fluency in English and comfort presenting complex technology clearly to both technical and non‑technical audiences.


**Important Information:**
* The role includes participating in an on‑call rotation approximately every 6-8 weeks.


**Join us to shape smarter living for people, businesses, and the planet**
 At Telia, we’re a team of 15 000 colleagues across the Nordics and Baltics, passionate about technology and connectivity. As a
 **Leading Telecommunications Operator** 
 &
 **Climate Leader** 
 , we drive change with large-scale, impactful projects while building a sustainable, inclusive world.
   

  

 Here, you can
 **grow your skills, lead meaningful projects, and thrive in a supportive, diverse environment.** 
 Whether you’re taking your first step or your next, Telia is a place to grow, belong, and make a real impact.
   

  

**What We Offer**
 When you join us, you'll receive a comprehensive benefits package tailored to your local market, opportunities for remote work, and more. You'll also have the chance to earn a bonus based on your performance and Telia's results.
   

  

**For Lithuanian applicants only: monthly salary range for this position - 4300-6500 EUR (gross) + annual performance bonuses** 
 . Although it may vary depending on your skills and experience.
   

  

**Ready to make better happen?**
 We look forward to receiving your application by
 **June 1** 
**.**
 If you’re selected for the next stage, you’ll be contacted by our
 **Talent Acquisition Partner** 
 . Background checks will be part of the process.
   

  

**Equal opportunities**
 At Telia, we recognize talent by
 **professional skills and growth potential.** 
 We champion diversity, ensuring every individual’s needs are met, regardless of disability, gender, age, nationality, sexual orientation, or social status. Together, we’re dedicated to fostering an inclusive work environment where
 **your uniqueness is our strength.**
**Join us and let’s make better happen - together!**

title: Digital ASIC SoC Architect, Stockholm
description:
**Job Title**
 Digital ASIC SoC Architect, Stockholm
   

  

**Job Description**
**Digital ASIC SoC Architect, Stockholm**
*Do you want to work with advanced ASIC development in the forefront of technology? Are you ready to join a team responsible for the very heart of the Axis products – the ARTPEC SoC chip – where your contribution really matters and where team collaboration is the way to success? We are now looking for a Digital ASIC SoC Architect to further strengthen the AXIS ASIC development in Stockholm.*
**Your Future Team**
 The ASIC System team is at the heart of developing the next generations of ARTPEC SoC chips. We are responsible for the SoC architecture and the ASIC implementation phase, playing a crucial role in both ongoing projects and future innovations. Our team consists of a Project Manager, SoC Architects, Design Engineers and Verification Engineers. We work closely with our ASIC vendor, internal RTL design and verification teams in Lund, and key stakeholders to ensure our SoC designs meet the highest standards.
   

  

 We are a highly skilled and motivated team with a mix of junior and senior members. Our strength lies in our individual expertise and our collaborative, open working environment. We are now looking for an ASIC SoC Architect to strengthen our team in areas such as security, low-power architecture, package and PI/SI, external interfaces, leadership, qualification, validation, AT test etc. You name your flavour, interest and expertise. The AXIS ASIC Department is at the coreof our technology, developing our own ASICs with hardware acceleration for essential functions in surveillance cameras. We design, develop, implement, integrate, and verify hardware modules that give us the competitive edge.
   

  

 Learn more; https://newsroom.axis.com/article/artpec-foundation-quality
   

  

**What You Will Do As An ASIC SoC Architect**
 As an ASIC SoC Architect, you will play a pivotal role throughout the ASIC project lifecycle. You will specify system-level requirements, define architecture, evaluate and select third-party IPs, and support RTL design and verification teams. You will also cooperate with our ASIC vendor during the implementation phase and work closely with internal hardware and software teams.
   

  

**Who are you?**
 We are seeking a highly motivated engineer with a background in electrical engineering, computer science, engineering physics, or a related field. We welcome both junior and senior engineers who bring qualities such as:
   

  

* 
* Knowledge of ASIC technologies, design, verification, testing, and manufacturing.
* 
* Understanding of SoC architecture.
* 
* Good grasp of embedded systems and hardware/software interaction.
* 
* Strong documentation skills.
* 
* Presentation and communication skills in English.


 As a person, we believe you are analytical, systematic, and enjoy sharing your knowledge and ideas with the team. Teamwork is crucial at Axis, so it's important that you contribute to a positive team
   

  

 spirit and a creative work environment.
   

  

**What Axis Offers**
 Your well-being matters to us. We offer a range of benefits, including a company bonus, Friday cake, wellness allowance, health insurance — and even your own Axis bicycle.
   

  

**Ready to Act?**
 If you’re excited about this opportunity, apply today! For more information, contact our recruiting ASIC Platform Manager, Hans Rönne, on +46 46 272 1293
   

  

 Type of Employment
   

  

 Permanent Employment
   

  

 Posting End Date
   

  

 2026-05-16
   

  

*Certain roles at Axis require background checks, which means applicable verifications will be done in these recruitments.* 
*Notice will be provided before we take any action.*
**About Axis Communications**
 We enable a smarter, safer world by creating innovative solutions for improving security and business performance. As a network technology company and industry leader, we offer solutions in video surveillance, access control, intercom, and audio systems, enhanced by intelligent analytics applications.
   

  

 With around 6000 committed employees in over 50 countries, we collaborate with partners worldwide. Together, we thrive in our friendly, open, and collaborative culture and inspire each other to think beyond the expected. United by our commitment to inclusion, diversity, and sustainability, we consistently seek to develop our skills and way of working.
   

  

**Let´s create a smarter, safer world**
 For more information about Axis, please visit our website www.axis.com.
   

  

 Listen to Get To Know Axis – Podcast

title: Senior Field Marketing Manager - EMEA
description:
**About ClickHouse**
 Recognized on the 2025 Forbes Cloud 100 list, ClickHouse is one of the most innovative and fast-growing private cloud companies. With more than 3,000 customers and ARR that has grown over 250 percent year over year, ClickHouse leads the market in real-time analytics, data warehousing, observability, and AI workloads.
   

  

 The company’s sustained, accelerating momentum was recently validated by a $400M Series D financing round. Over the past three months, customers including Capital One, Lovable, Decagon, Polymarket, and Airwallex have adopted the platform or expanded existing deployments. These customers join an established base of AI innovators and global brands such as Meta, Cursor, Sony, and Tesla.
   

  

 We’re on a mission to transform how companies use data. Come be a part of our journey!
   

  

 ClickHouse is hiring a Senior Field Marketing Manager to play a foundational role in driving awareness and consideration for our product among enterprise companies through events (virtual and in-person) in the UKI, Nordics and Benelux.
   

  

 In this role, your mission will be to accelerate the impact of our sales team with field marketing tactics alongside the Head of Regional Marketing in EMEA. Day to day activities center around high-quality execution of events with comprehensive end-to-end campaigns, identifying event trends for ClickHouse’s enterprise audience, and running campaign analysis to continuously optimize our field strategy.
   

  

**Responsibilities**
* EMEA travel required >40% of the time. (This will continue to decrease as the team grows.)
* Collaborate closely with sales management, product marketing, field sales, and developer advocacy to design and execute integrated field events that support both immediate and long-term business objectives for ClickHouse.
* Translate demand generation strategies into impactful events and experiences by working with cross-functional teams, including engineering, product, and sales leaders, to develop content and promotional strategies that drive high attendance and engagement.
* Work with external partners and third-party organizations to co-host events, webinars, and joint marketing initiatives, helping to expand ClickHouse's reach and strengthen its market presence.
* Manage the entire event lifecycle, including contracts, planning, logistics, and on-the-ground execution for a variety of events such as trade shows, conferences, hosted events, and webinars.
* Develop and implement comprehensive event campaigns, covering audience segmentation, promotional tactics, and follow-up strategies to ensure consistent lead generation and audience engagement.
* Track and analyze the performance of field marketing campaigns and events, using data insights to refine strategies and deliver measurable results.
* Maintain a detailed event calendar and actively identify new event opportunities that align with ClickHouse’s marketing goals and priorities.
* Coordinate all event logistics, ensuring the smooth delivery of materials, booth properties, graphics, promotional items, and equipment throughout transportation and setup.
* Provide internal teams with clear guidance on event responsibilities and task assignments, ensuring alignment with company goals and effective collaboration across departments.


**Requirements**
* 5+ years of experience in field marketing, event marketing or regional marketing within the B2B SaaS space. Experience in database or data analytics industries is required.
* Demonstrated success in driving pipeline generation and increasing brand awareness through field marketing efforts.
* Excellent project management skills, with experience in organizing and executing events at both small and large scales.
* Strong analytical skills with the ability to measure and report on the effectiveness of marketing programs.
* Experience working closely with sales teams to ensure alignment on objectives, messaging, and campaign execution.
* Ability to work independently in a fast-paced, remote-first environment. Comfortable with ambiguity and adapting to evolving business needs.


**Compensation**
 For roles based in the
 **United States** 
 , the typical starting salary range for this position is listed above. In certain locations, such as the San Francisco Bay Area and the New York City Metro Area, a premium market range may apply, as listed.
   

  

 These salary ranges reflect what we reasonably and in good faith believe to be the minimum and maximum pay for this role at the time of posting. The actual compensation may be higher or lower than the amounts listed, and the ranges may be subject to future adjustments.
   

  

 An individual’s placement within the range will depend on various factors, including (but not limited to) education, qualifications, certifications, experience, skills, location, performance, and the needs of the business or organization.
   

  

 If you have any questions or comments about compensation as a candidate, please get in touch with us at paytransparency@clickhouse.com.
   

  

**Perks**
* Flexible work environment - ClickHouse is a globally distributed company and remote-friendly. We currently operate in over 20 countries.
* Healthcare - Employer contributions towards your healthcare.
* Equity in the company - Every new team member who joins our company receives stock options.
* Time off - Flexible time off in the US, generous entitlement in other countries.
* A $500 Home office setup if you’re a remote employee.
* Global Gatherings – We believe in the power of in-person connection and offer opportunities to engage with colleagues at company-wide offsites.


**Culture - We All Shape It**
 As part of a rapidly scaling start up, you will be instrumental in shaping our culture.
   

  

 Are you interested in finding out more about our culture? Learn more about our values here. Check out our blog posts or follow us on LinkedIn to find out more about what’s happening at ClickHouse.
   

  

**Equal Opportunity & Privacy**
 ClickHouse provides equal employment opportunities to all employees and applicants and prohibits discrimination and harassment of any type based on factors such as race, color, religion, age, sex, national origin, disability status, genetics, protected veteran status, sexual orientation, gender identity or expression, or any other characteristic protected by federal, state or local laws.
   

  

 Please see here for our Privacy Statement.

title: Chief Financial Officer
description:
**Interim CFO till internationellt tillväxtbolag, 50%, Stockholm** 




  





 Meritmind söker för kunds räkning en interim CFO till ett spännande bolag inom Healthcare.
 



 Detta är ett konsultuppdrag (50%) med start i början av augusti fram till årsskiftet. Fokus ligger på att bygga struktur, skapa finansiell kontroll och stötta bolaget i en expansiv fas.
 



  





**Huvudsakliga arbetsuppgifter som Interim CFO** 



* Ta helhetsansvar för bolagets finansiella styrning, inklusive strategi och struktur
* Etablera och utveckla processer för ekonomistyrning och uppföljning
* Säkerställa god kostnadskontroll, likviditetsplanering och kassaflödesstyrning
* Stötta ledningen i affärsbeslut och bidra som strategisk partner
* Arbeta med finansiell planering inför tillväxt och expansion,
* Hantera komplex finansiell miljö, inklusive momsfria affärsflöden och SaaS-inslag
* Utveckla och upprätthålla relationer med redovisning, revisor och bank
* Bidra i expansionsinitiativ, inklusive etablering på nya marknader och franchiselösningar



  





**Kvalifikationer och erfarenhet** 




 Vi söker dig som har gedigen erfarenhet från rollen som CFO eller motsvarande senior finansiell position, gärna från tillväxtbolag och i en entreprenörsdriven miljö. Du har arbetat nära ledning och styrelse och är van att kombinera strategiskt tänkande med operativt genomförande. Erfarenhet av internationell verksamhet är viktigt, liksom god förståelse för finansiella frågor kopplade till expansion, franchise och kapitalanskaffning. Du har goda kunskaper inom redovisning, moms, skatt, revision och komplexa affärsmodeller, exempelvis inom momsfria verksamheter och är van att arbeta datadrivet. Erfarenhet från tech- eller healthcare-sektor ses som meriterande.
 



  





**Personliga egenskaper** 




 För att lyckas i rollen ser vi att du är en analytisk och lösningsorienterad person som trivs i en miljö där förutsättningarna förändras snabbt. Du är trygg i din kompetens och har förmågan att skapa struktur i en organisation där mycket byggs upp från grunden. Som person är du kommunikativ och prestigelös, med ett naturligt sätt att samarbeta och bygga förtroende i ledningsgruppen. Du drivs av att bidra till tillväxt och att vara en aktiv del i ett entreprenörsdrivet bolag.
 



  





**Om företaget** 




 Kunden är ett internationellt bolag inom healthcare med verksamhet i Norden och Asien. Bolaget har vuxit snabbt under de senaste åren och nu står man inför en omfattande expansionsfas med planer på geografisk tillväxt och franchiselösningar. Bolaget präglas av en entreprenöriell och innovativ kultur där beslutsvägarna är korta och ambitionerna höga. Här erbjuds du en central roll i att forma den finansiella strukturen och bidra till bolagets fortsatta utveckling och framtida exit.
 



 Placeringsort: Stockholm City, möjlighet till distansarbete.
 



  





**Om Meritmind** 




 Meritmind är ett av Sveriges ledande konsult- och rekryteringsbolag inom ekonomiområdet. Med ett stort nätverk av skarpa ekonomikonsulter och träffsäkra rekryteringar hjälper Meritmind människor och företag att lyckas inom ekonomiområdet varje dag. 25 års erfarenhet har gjort oss till en ledstjärna – för verksamheter i behov av expertis och för ekonomer som värdesätter utveckling och omtanke. Från våra kontor i Stockholm, Göteborg, Malmö, Uppsala, Linköping, Västerås och Jönköping sysselsätter vi 400 personer och verkar över hela Sverige.
 



  





**Ansökan** 




 För mer information om konsultuppdraget är du välkommen att kontakta ansvarig konsultchef.
 



 Intervjuer och urval kommer att ske löpande, så skicka gärna din ansökan så snart som möjligt. Se till att namn och kontaktuppgifter finns med i ditt CV och det är endast möjligt att bifoga ett dokument.
 



 Meritmind arbetar kompetensbaserat för att främja en objektiv och icke-diskriminerande konsultprocess.
 



**Tänk på detta innan du skickar in din ansökan (i enlighet med GDPR-lagstiftningen)** 




 Din ansökan ska ej innehålla personuppgifter kring civilstatus, familjesituation/barn, etniskt ursprung, ålder, politiska åsikter, religiös eller filosofisk övertygelse, medlemskap i fackförening, hälsa eller sexuell läggning.
 



**Välkommen med din ansökan!**

title: Senior Data Scientist till Choreograph / WPP Media
description:
**Vill du arbeta hands-on med MMM, attribution och experiment för att maximera effekten av varje marknadsinvestering och bidra till att vidareutveckla våra modeller och stärka kvaliteten i våra leveranser?** 




  





**Choreograph stärker nu upp teamet med en Senior Data Scientist som vill kombinera djup analytisk expertis med affärsförståelse – och hjälpa några av Nordens största varumärken att fatta bättre beslut om hur deras marknads- och medieinvesteringar driver tillväxt.** 




  





  





**Om oss** 




 Choreograph är WPP Medias samlingsplats för några av branschens skarpaste hjärnor inom data, analys och teknik. Vi hjälper våra kunder att fatta bättre beslut och driva affärsutveckling genom datadrivna strategier och tekniska lösningar. Vår styrka ligger i att kombinera avancerade analysmetoder med djup förståelse för marknadsföring och medielandskapet – och att omsätta detta i strategier som skapar mätbar affärsnytta.
 



  





 Vi värdesätter en inkluderande kultur där olika perspektiv, erfarenheter och bakgrunder bidrar till vår gemensamma framgång.
 



  





  





**Om rollen** 




 Som Senior Data Scientist hos oss har du en nyckelroll i att forma och driva vår fortsatta framgång. Rollen innebär ett ledande ansvar i att attrahera, utveckla och fördjupa våra kundrelationer, samtidigt som du vidareutvecklar våra modeller och stärker kvaliteten i våra leveranser.
 



  





 I rollen kombinerar du ett starkt affärsfokus med djup analytisk kompetens. Du är med och driver utvecklingen av vår leverans och dess kommersiella effekt, löser komplexa marknadsutmaningar med hjälp av data och bidrar till att utveckla och coacha våra nya stjärnor.
 



  





**Dina huvudsakliga arbetsuppgifter:** 




**Mätning av marknadsinvesteringar och strategisk rådgivning** 




 Du hjälper våra kunder att förstå och mäta den faktiska effekten av sina marknadsinvesteringar med hjälp av mätmetoder som exempelvis Marketing Mix Modelling. Rollen innebär att paketera och presentera insikterna på ett övertygande och pedagogiskt sätt för att engagera och informera beslutsfattare på C-level hos några av de största bolagen i Norden.
 



  





**Hands-on genom hela analysprocessen** 




 Du arbetar operativt genom hela analysprocessen – inte bara genom att vägleda kollegor utan genom att själv aktivt genomföra den tekniska analysen, både självständigt och tillsammans med teamet. Du driver och genomför avancerade analysprojekt inom exempelvis MMM, attribution, experiment, forecasting och algoritmutveckling och arbetar hands-on i Python och relevanta statistiska ramverk för att utveckla robusta och metodologiskt försvarbara modeller, arbetssätt, metoder, rapporter och lösningar.
 



  





**Affärsutveckling och kundrelationer** 




 Du tar fram och presenterar skräddarsydda lösningsförslag som tydligt visar värdet av datadrivna beslut och agerar ämnesexpert i säljmöten och vid kundevent. Med din expertis bygger du förtroende och utvecklar långsiktiga kundrelationer på ledningsnivå.
 



  





  





**Vi söker dig som har** 



* Relevant universitets- eller högskoleutbildning (ekonomi, marknadsföring, statistik, datavetenskap eller liknande).
* Ett starkt affärsmässigt mindset och erfarenhet från marknads- och medieområdet.
* Mycket god kommunikativ förmåga och förmåga att pedagogiskt förklara tekniska frågeställningar och lösningar för personer utan teknisk bakgrund.
* Djup kompetens inom statistik, ekonometri och avancerad modellering, med erfarenhet av tillämpning inom exempelvis Marketing Mix Modelling (MMM), attribution och experimentdesign.
* Programmeringskunskaper (vi använder Python som huvudsakligt programmeringsspråk).
* Erfarenhet av att arbeta med Cloud, SQL, GIT, PowerBI eller liknande relevanta teknologier.
* Flytande i både svenska och engelska.
* Mycket goda kunskaper i Excel och PowerPoint.



  





  





**Varför Choreograph / WPP Media** 




 Hos oss får du vara en del av en internationell koncern samtidigt som du arbetar nära WPP Medias största kunder i Norden. Du får verka i en miljö där data, analys och strategi möts – och där dina insikter verkligen kan påverka kundernas affärsresultat. Vi erbjuder en dynamisk arbetsplats där nyfikenhet, samarbete och innovation är centrala värden.
 



  





 Vi välkomnar ansökningar från alla, oavsett kön, bakgrund eller identitet.
 



  





**Vi ser fram emot att välkomna dig till oss!** 




  





  





**Om tjänsten och ansökan** 




 Tjänsten är en tillsvidareanställning på heltid med placering på vårt huvudkontor i centrala Stockholm.
 



  





 Rekryteringen görs i samarbete med WOOW Executive Search, rekryteringsexperter inom digital marknadsföring, marknad, sälj, analys och martech. För frågor och intresse, kontakta Lisa på 070–7505760 (lisa@woowes.com) eller Anton på 070–7321930 (anton@woowes.com).
 



  





 Med anledning av GDPR hanteras endast ansökningar som inkommer via ansökningslänken för uppdraget.

title: SAP EWM Solution Architect
description:
If you enjoy working with high-calibre people on interesting projects in a thriving partnership organization, Westernacher is the place to be!
   

  

 To complement our team in
 **Sweden** 
 , we are looking for an
 **SAP EWM Solution Architect** 
**.**
**Your Responsibilities**
* Successfully implement business processes and develop solutions in the area of Supply Chain Execution based on SAP EWM
* Take responsibility for the planning and implementation of EWM projects
* Configure SAP EWM incl. doing tests, writing documentation and performing validation
* Support the development team by creating specifications and test scripts
* Take responsibility for the planning and implementation of EWM projects
* Participate in pre-sales activities and customer workshops


**Your Skills And Experience**
* 7+ years of implementing SAP WM / EWM
* Functional / technical proficiency with at least 4 full cycle SAP WM / EWM implementations, design, configuration, testing and experience in different industries
* Good cross-module knowledge to design end-to-end logistics processes (SD, MM, LE-Shipping, Yard and Transportation)
* Experience in creating and delivering customer proposals and presales workshops
* Excellent communication and presentation skills in Swedish and English (other languages are an advantage)
* Good team player with very good logical and reasoning skills, who enjoys working in a global environment and is committed to high-quality project delivery
* Willingness and availability to travel if the project requires it


**Our Promise**
* A diverse and versatile role with ample opportunities to shape your work in a 100% employee-owned company
* Competitive remuneration package
* Inspiring and exciting, innovative working environment
* Partnership culture with a strong entrepreneurial spirit and opportunity for partnership/co-ownership
* Environment of open communication, trust and regular feedback
* International company culture and minimal hierarchical structure
* Chance to work on complex projects from different industries and add to your business process knowhow
* Flexible working hours and hybrid working model


**Interested? Then, don't hesitate to apply!**
**This Is WE**
 Committed to innovation, since 1969 Westernacher Consulting operates worldwide, with more than 1000 consultants in Europe, Asia and the Americas. We provide global business and SAP consulting, serving medium to large sized enterprises striving for innovation, operational excellence and profitable, sustainable growth. Headquartered in Heidelberg, Germany, Westernacher Consulting is the global leader in business process and technology innovation.
   

  

 Living, working, and operating in partnership. We are inquisitive, creative thinkers with a strong entrepreneurial spirit. We question new ways of working, think differently and are willing to try out new approaches to create value and innovation for our customers. All of this makes us pioneers in our field and keeps us responsive, quality-focused and results-oriented.
   

  

 Westernacher is a diverse work environment and is proud to be an equal-opportunity employer. All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, color, religion, gender, sexual orientation, national origin, genetics, disability, age, or veteran status. Westernacher is also committed to compliance with all fair employment practices regarding citizenship and immigration status.
   

  

 We may use artificial intelligence (AI) tools to support parts of the hiring process, such as reviewing applications, analyzing resumes, or assessing responses. These tools assist our recruitment team but do not replace human judgment. Final hiring decisions are ultimately made by humans. If you would like more information about how your data is processed, please contact us.

title: Production Planning Engineer
description:
**Join Crane Currency as a Production Planning Engineer in TUMBA and make a difference where people truly matter.**

**Who we are:**


Crane Currency is a premier industrial technology company and a pioneer in currency manufacturing and advanced micro-optics technology for securing physical products. Yes, chances are you have our product in your wallet right now! Our sophisticated equipment and software leverage proprietary core capabilities with detection and sensing technologies. Around the world, our customers trust us to anticipate their needs with innovative, reliable, and high-quality currency & authentication solutions and services—just as they have for generations. Learn more at www.cranecurrency.com

**How you will make an impact:**


As a Production Planning Engineer at Crane Currency, you will play a crucial role in enhancing our processes and ensuring high-quality materials are ready for production. You will be responsible for maintaining the production schedule, identifying and mitigating potential issues, and ensuring timely delivery to our customers. Your role involves efficient and stable planning of banknote paper production in Tumba, aligning the requirements of Customers, Management, Factory, and Finance. Both short-term and long-term planning, along with follow-ups, are essential to ensure consistency and efficiency.


In your role you will:

* Be responsible for the factory production planning with a sense of ownership to make sure planning is performed well and information reaches receivers in the agreed way and via the agreed communication tools. Special attention should be directed towards clarity, efficiency and reduced waste.
* Count down of production including making sure relevant communication is forwarded within the company. Make sure count down time is efficient to avoid re-runs and too much overproduction.
* Be the central point of information in the process to plan efficiently, share information with internal and external departments about the current situation.
* Support the Master Planning process and discuss with all related internal parties regarding the Master Planning fulfilment of the Sales plan
* Participate in all parts of the Central Planning process together with the other factories in the group. Co-ordinate and align details with all internal and external departments.
* Understand the requirements of the Bid process to make sure the promises to customers can later be met
* Follow up production results and publish reports daily, weekly and monthly.
* Participate in work to develop tools for planning and countdown to automate the process within Tumba and together with other sites.

**Knowledge and expertise that matter most for this role:**

**Required:**

* Relevant university degree in Engineering or Business Administration.
* Experience from Production planning, preferably in a distributed environment.
* Experience working in logistics.
* Documented leadership skills (formal / informal / projects)
* Detail oriented, curious, good with numbers.
* **Language:** Very good knowledge of **Swedish** and English, with strong verbal and written communication skills, including presentation abilities
* **IT**:Good knowledge of Office and ERP.

**Preferred:**

* Education in Planning, Logistics, statistics or the like.
* Knowledge of PowerBI, Excel programming etc.

**Tumba-Benefits**

**How we will care for you:**


We offer top-notch medical benefits including a wellness allowance and reimbursement for medicines and medical care, opportunities for personal development, community engagement activities, competitive compensation, vacation, parental leave, and multiple tiers of retirement plans. Discover more about our benefits here **https://www.cranecurrency.com/careers/benefits/**

**What drives our team:**


We are a passionate team of 1,200 creators and problem solvers, united by our purpose, we give people confidence every day in moments that matter. This comes to life through our Shared Values:

* People Matter
* Do the Right Thing
* Trusted Partner
* Innovate for Growth
* Always Improving


Learn more about our values and culture: **https://www.cranecurrency.com/careers/life-at-crane-currency/**


You can also check us out at: **https://www.glassdoor.com/Reviews/Crane-Currency-Reviews-E1187198.htm**

**Where we are:**


Your role is in Tumba, Stockholm, located in the historic Tumba Bruk area, ten-minute walking distance from the train station, 30 km south of Stockholm, and about 20 minutes from Stockholm Central Station. Check out what makes Tumba a great place to live and work here: **https://www.cranecurrency.com/media/12rbruyv/0133-ex55-crane-currency-tumba-sweden-site-location-package-october-2024-lr.pdf**


-


Crane Currency is a drug free workplace.

title: Technical Sales Engineer Nordics
description:
ImpulseRadar Sweden AB | Based in Sweden (Umeå, Skellefteå, or Malå preferred) | Reports to International Sales Manager
  
Curious about what's beneath the surface? So are we. Join ImpulseRadar and help us change how the world sees underground.
  
ImpulseRadar builds ground-penetrating radar (GPR) systems that make the invisible visible — for highways, utilities, mining, and archaeology. We are headquartered in Malå, with offices in Umeå and Charleston, SC, and we are part of the Addtech Group (Nasdaq Stockholm) — a technical solutions group with more than 140 subsidiaries across Europe. That means a stable owner and a long-term view behind a small, ambitious team.
  
The Opportunity
  
This is not a traditional sales role. The Nordics are a greenfield market for us — a structural mismatch given our Swedish heritage and regional relevance. Your job is to close that gap.
  
You will own the development of Sweden, Norway, Finland, and Denmark and turn the region into a key Market — owning the pipeline end-to-end, from prospecting and technical discovery through demonstration and close.
  
You will spend much of your time in the field — running demos in real soil, real weather, and real data conditions — and the rest building the relationships, market intelligence, and customer network the region deserves. National road authorities, mining groups, utility operators, major consultancies, and research institutes are all in scope.
  
HQ marketing, application engineering, and the International Sales Manager are your committed support team. This is a role for someone who wants ownership of a region, whilst being part of an established team.
  
Who You Are
  
* Technical foundation. An engineering or applied-science degree is an advantage, but hands-on experience in GPR, geophysics, surveying, geotechnical instrumentation, or a related subsurface or sensing technology, is more important.
* Commercial edge. A track record in B2B technical sales or business development with clear commercial outcomes and a challenger mindset.
* Credibility. Nordic technical buyers expect substance. You can discuss antenna frequency selection and dielectric behavior as naturally as commercial terms.
* Self-direction. This is a single-resource region. You will work independently, make judgment calls without an office down the hall, and keep your own pipeline honest.
* Language skills. Fluent Swedish and English. Other Nordic language would be an advantage.


Practical Details
  
* Based in Sweden — Umeå, Skellefteå, or Malå preferred — with flexibility for hybrid work.
* Travel: 40–60% across the four Nordic countries, plus regular presence in Malå.
* Primarily a direct sales role with possible re-seller management. CRM: Upsales.


What We Offer
  
* A genuinely unowned region, a real mandate, and explicit HQ support — not a cold-start with no backing.
* Dedicated Nordic demo equipment, a named application-engineering contact, and direct access to the International Sales Manager.
* A technically leading product line and a software ecosystem worth representing.
* Stable ownership as part of Addtech Group and strong financial standing.


How to Apply
  
Send your CV and a short note describing a technical sale you are proud of — what the customer needed, what you did, and what the outcome was — to hr@impulseradar.se. Applications are reviewed on a rolling basis; start date is flexible.

title: Connectivity Verification Engineer
description:
At Coretura, we are building advanced software and system solutions that shape the future of connected mobility. Our teams work close to the technology, close to the product, and close to the people who drive innovation forward.
  
As part of our team, you’ll work with wireless technologies, from Wi‑Fi 7 and advanced Bluetooth stacks to V2X, satellite communication, and 5G modem platforms. If you enjoy exploring how complex systems behave in the real world and want to be part of a highly skilled engineering environment, this could be your next step.
  
About the role
  
In this role, you take ownership of validating complete connectivity experiences across automotive and embedded platforms. You’ll work hands‑on with wireless systems, design test strategies, analyze behavior across layers, and collaborate closely with developers, architects, and system engineers.
  
Your work directly influences quality, user experience, and how tomorrow’s connected solutions are built.
  
What you will do
  
Your mission is to understand — and improve — how wireless systems behave as a whole. You will:
  
  

Validate GNSS positioning accuracy across multi‑constellation receivers, including analysis of positioning performance and behavior. Good to have knowledge of NMEA data streams
  
  

Analyze cellular behavior from 2G–5G, including APN management, modem sleep/wake, and IP performance.
  
  

Validate Wi‑Fi 7 stability, security, and performance across different operating modes.
  
  

Ensure smooth eSIM/iSIM provisioning and lifecycle handling.
  
  

Evaluate Bluetooth and BLE performance in real scenarios (pairing, multi‑device handling, audio streaming).
  
  

Ensure smooth eSIM/iSIM provisioning and lifecycle handling.
  
  

Work with V2X communication, verifying reliability, safety‑critical message handling, and PKI integration.
  
  

Validate projection and connectivity services such as Android Auto and CarPlay.
  
  

Explore system performance when switching between terrestrial networks and satellite/NTN connections.
  
  

Troubleshoot issues across software, hardware, and RF domains, driving root cause analysis through hands‑on investigation of networking fundamentals and protocols (e.g., DNS, TCP/IP, UDP)
  
  

Rather than isolated feature checks, you focus on true system behavior and how everything works together.
  
Who you are
  
You’re likely someone who enjoys digging into how wireless technologies behave in practice — and who doesn’t shy away from complex problem solving. We believe you’ll thrive if you have:
  
  

Experience validating or developing wireless communication (Bluetooth, Wi‑Fi, cellular, V2X or similar).
  
  

Understanding of RF fundamentals, protocol stacks, or embedded system communication flows.
  
  

Experience analyzing logs, debugging across layers, and collaborating with cross‑functional teams.
  
  

A curious, structured mindset with a passion for continuous learning.
  
  

Professional proficiency in English.
  
  

You don’t need all the keywords — what matters is your drive, depth, and ability to learn.
  
Why Coretura?
  
Coretura builds software and system solutions used in tomorrow’s connected vehicles. We work long‑term with product development in areas like connectivity, embedded platforms, and software‑defined mobility.
  
At Coretura you will be part of a skilled engineering community where people support each other, share knowledge, and care about building high‑quality technology. We value trust, autonomy, and continuous learning — and we offer meaningful work with modern tech that truly matters.

description:

Are you interested in working on the next generation of Machine Learning based Edge devices? Are you passionate about embedded computing?


This is a fantastic opportunity to get into the exciting world of Embedded ML with a company that can enable your ideas to shape the future!


Arm works with the industry’s best companies to build sector-leading products from our designs. You will share ideas, learn new skills and collaborate with the best engineers in the world. title: Electrical System Architect
description:
**Assignment description**


Electrical System Architect – Join Us in Driving Sustainable Mobility!


Help us power the future of transportation with cutting-edge innovation!


We are on the lookout for a talented Electrical System Architect to join our Electronics & Software group. This is a fantastic opportunity to take on a pivotal role in shaping robust electrical architecture for our products, spanning hybrid and fully electric powertrain solutions.


As part of a highly skilled and top-performing in-house team, you will be instrumental in delivering world-class powertrain systems that revolutionize sustainable mobility.

**About the Role**


As Electrical System Architect, you will lead the strategic design and development of electrical and electronic systems for our products. With a comprehensive scope encompassing hybrid engine control systems all the way to fully electric drivetrains – including functionalities like Electrical Drive Units and inverters – you will be at the forefront of technological innovation.


Your responsibility is to ensure that our system architecture is designed with scalability, performance, and safety in mind while adhering to industry standards. You will collaborate with cross-functional teams of Software Component Owners, Hardware Developers, and specialists in System Safety, Cyber Security, and EMC.

**Key Responsibilities**

* Define and develop system architecture for electrical and electronic systems, spanning hybrid and electric powertrain solutions.
* Define tailored requirements for our product portfolio, interpret and adapt customer requirements for new products.
* Oversee integration and scalability of electrical systems, ensuring seamless interaction between subsystems and ECUs.
* Collaborate with component owners for ECUs and other critical hardware to align design specifications with system-level requirements.
* Ensure compliance with automotive safety and performance standards, including ISO 26262 and cybersecurity regulations.
* Tackle technical challenges such as communication network design, EMC impact, and topology optimization for the electrical system.
* Drive industrialization of electrical systems from initial concept to production readiness.
* Act as the central technical expert for electrical architecture in communications with suppliers and internal stakeholders.

**Skill requirements**

**Your Profile**


Are you ready to take ownership of visionary and sustainable system designs? We believe you are a highly skilled and innovative engineer with strong leadership qualities and the ability to see both the big picture and the technical details.


﻿

**Requirements:**

* A Master’s degree or equivalent in Electrical Engineering, Automotive Engineering, or a related field.
* Proven track record in defining and developing electrical system architecture within the automotive industry.
* Extensive knowledge of ECU design, communication protocols, and relevant industry standards such as AUTOSAR, ISO 26262, and Cyber Security regulations.
* Deep technical understanding of EMC challenges, load balancing, and signal interactions within vehicles.
* Demonstrated ability to collaborate with component owners and systems experts while driving integration across hardware and software disciplines.
* Experience with Volvo Cars, AB Volvo, or Geely Group companies is highly meritorious.
* Strong problem-solving skills paired with a proactive and structured approach to managing complex requirements.
